english_query: why someone's character does not decide if their point is right
ugf_response:
When people talk about what is true, they often look at the person who is speaking. If a person is good, kind, and tells only what is true, others might think that what they say is true. If a person is not good, is mean, or tells lies, others might think that what they say is not true. This is how many people think, but it is a way of thinking that leads to being wrong.

To understand why, we must look at two different things. First, we look at the person. This is who they are, how they act, and how they feel. Second, we look at the thought or the thing they are saying.

The truth of a thing does not change because of who says it. Let us look at this case. Imagine a person who is very not good and does many things that hurt others. If this person says that the sun is hot and bright, they are telling the truth. The sun is hot and bright even if a person who is not good says it. The way a person is not good does not make the sun cold.

On the other hand, imagine a person who is very good, kind, and loved by everyone. If this person says that two and two make five, they are wrong. The way a person is good does not make the way we count wrong. Being a good person does not make a wrong thought become right.

When we want to know if a thing is true, we must look only at the thing itself. We must look at the things that are real and see if they fit together. We must look at the things we can see and touch. We must not look at the person who is speaking. If we look at the person instead of the thing, we will be wrong. We might believe a lie because the speaker is nice, or we might not believe a truth because the speaker is mean. To find what is real, we must keep the person and the thought away from each other.

english_query: why someone's character does not decide if their point is right
ugf_response:
The person starts with the first idea. They say that how a person lives and how they act is not the same thing as what they say is true. They say that a bad person can still say things that are true. They also say that a good person can say things that are not true. This part is true. The truth of a thing does not change because of the person who says it. A thing is true or it is not true all by itself.

The second idea is what they think follows from the first idea. They think that we should not look at the person to see if their words are right. They think we must look only at the words themselves. If we look at the person instead of the words, we might think something is true just because we like the person. Or we might think something is not true just because we do not like them. This is what they think happens when we do not follow their first idea.

The third idea is about whether their thinking is good. Their thinking is good because it helps us find what is true. If we only listen to people we like, we will not see the truth when it comes from someone we do not like. Their way of thinking keeps us from doing something that is not right. It keeps us from letting our feelings about a person change how we see the world. This is a good way to think if we want to know what is real.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
Imagine you have two things. The first thing is a piece of information that you know is true. The second thing is a new piece of information that you want to know is also true. You want to know if the second thing must be true because the first thing is true. This is a way of seeing if the first thing leads to the second thing in a way that cannot be wrong.

The hard question is how we can be sure that the second thing follows from the first. How do we know that we are not just doing something wrong in our heads? How do we know that the path from the first thing to the second thing is a real path and not just something we want to see?

Some people say that we can find the answer by looking at the way things work in the world. They look at what happens and see if the way things move stays the same. If they see that every time the first thing happens, the second thing also happens, they think it is a good sign. They believe that the world shows us the truth if we watch it well. But some say this is not enough, because even if it happened many times before, it might not happen next time.

Other people say that we should only look at the way the thoughts are built. They do not care about the world outside. They only care if the steps in the thinking are the way they should be. They say that if you start with something true and you follow the steps of thought without doing something wrong, then the end must be true. They think the truth is found in the way the pieces of thought fit together, like pieces of a wood house.

There are also people who say that we can never be very sure. They say that our minds can play games on us. They think that we might see a path where there is no path. They say that we can only say that something is probably true, but we can never say it is the only thing that can be true. They believe that there is always a small chance that we are wrong.

english_query: People say that what is true is right to all. Because anyone who says that what is true is not there is saying that what is true is not there; and if what is true is not there, then the words 'what is true is not there' would be true; and if any true thing is there, there must be what is true. But god is what is true itself: 'I am the way, the what is true, and the life.' So the words 'god is there' are right to all.

english_query: the problem of everyone using up something that belongs to all
ugf_response:
The first idea is that some things belong to everyone and no one person. These things are things that all people can use and no one person can own alone. The second idea is that every person wants to use these things to make their own life better. The third idea is that when many people use a thing at the same time, they take more than what is right for them. The idea after the third idea is that because no one owns the thing, no one feels they must take care of it or stop others from using it too much.

The person thinks that because of these ideas, a bad thing will happen. They think that if everyone acts in their own way to get what they want, the thing that belongs to everyone will be used up or broken. They think that what is good for one person is bad for the whole group of people. They think that this will lead to a place where the thing is gone and no one can use it anymore.

We must look at if the thinking is good. The first part is true. It is true that some things belong to everyone and that people often use them in ways that make them go away. The second part is also true. It is true that if people only think about themselves, they will use things up too fast. However, the thinking might not be good if it says that people cannot find a way to work together. The thinking holds the thought that people cannot make a new way of living where they take care of things together. It also holds the thought that people cannot make new ways to stop the thing from going away. So, the thinking is true about the problem, but it might not be the only way things can go.

english_query: when it is good enough to pick something that works instead of the best thing
ugf_response:
The first idea is that sometimes a thing is good enough to use. This thing does not have to be the very best thing that can be made or found. It just has to do what it needs to do. The second idea is that when we pick this good enough thing, we do not spend all our time or all our money trying to find the best thing. This is what the person thinks follows from the first idea. They think we can save our power and our things for other jobs.

To see if the thinking is good, we must look at how the parts fit together. The first part is true because we cannot always have the best of everything. If we tried to make everything the best, we would never finish anything. The second part is also true because saving our things helps us do more. However, we must be careful. If we pick something that is too low in how well it works, it might break or fail. If it fails, we will lose more than we saved. So, the way of thinking is good only if we know where to stop looking for the best and where to start using what we have.

english_query: what it means for a case to be put together well
ugf_response: To tell about why someone should believe a thing is true, you must start with what you know is true. First, you look at the things you see and the things people tell you. Second, you must make sure these things are not wrong or made up. Third, you take these true things and put them together in a way that makes sense. You must show that if these things are true, then the new thing you want people to believe must also be true. The step after the third step is that you must make sure you are not using bad ways of thinking that lead to a wrong answer. You must show that your way of thinking is good and that it does not have holes where wrong things can get in. The step after that is that you must show that there are no other ways to explain the things you see that would make your new thing not true. If you do all these things, then the way you put your thoughts together is good.

english_query: what it means for a case to be put together well
ugf_response:
When you want to make someone believe that something is true, you must build a way to show them. This way of showing is what we call a case. To make a case that is good, you must do many things well.

First, you must have things that show what you are saying is true. These things are pieces of what happened. If you say a man took a bag, you must show the bag was in his hand or show that he was in the place where the bag was. These pieces must be strong. If a piece is not strong or if it is not true, the whole thing will fall down. You cannot use pieces that might be wrong.

Second, you must put these pieces together in a way that makes sense. It is not enough to just have many pieces. You must show how one piece leads to the next piece. If you have piece number one and piece number two, you must show how they work together to show your main point. If the pieces do not fit together, the person listening will be confused. They will not see the path you are trying to show them.

Third, you must look for things that might make your case look bad. There are often other ways to look at the same pieces. If you say the man took the bag because he had no food to eat, someone else might say he took the bag because he wanted to be mean. A good case thinks about these other ways before anyone else can say them. You must show why the other ways are not true. This makes your case much harder to break.

Finally, you must make sure your case stays the same from the start to the end. You cannot say one thing at the beginning and then say something different later. If your pieces fight against each other, no one will believe you. A good case is like a house built with strong wood and stones. Every part holds the other parts up, and the whole thing stays standing even when people try to push it over.

english_query: Doctor Alden confronts Mirren. "I tested your tonic. It's chamomile water with honey. There is no active ingredient. You're deceiving your patients." Mirren replies calmly, "I tell them it's a healing tonic, and they feel better. Their grip strength, sleep, and appetite improve. Are you going to tell a mother whose child finally slept through the night that she wasn't really helped? The tonic does nothing. The belief does something. Are those the same?"
ugf_response: First, we look at what the doctor says. He checked the drink. It is just flower water and sweet stuff. He says the woman is lying because she says it fixes people. Then, we look at what the woman says. She points out that the people feel good. They sleep well and eat well. She asks if the good feeling is not real just because the drink did not do it. This is a hard choice. On one side, there is the truth about what is in the cup. On the other side, there is the good change in the person. If we say the woman is wrong, we say that only the thing in the cup matters. But if the person feels good, does it matter why? Some might say it does not matter. If the child sleeps, the mother is happy. The change is good. But we must think deeper. What if the drink hides a bad body problem? If the problem gets worse while the person feels okay for a bit, then the good feeling is bad. Also, is it right to tell a lie? If we know it is a lie, we are not being open with the person. We are making them believe something that is not true. Even if they feel good now, they are not free to choose. They think they are getting help from the drink, but they are getting help from their own mind. This is a mind game. It works, but it is not the drink. So, are they the same? No. The drink doing nothing is different from the mind doing something. One is empty. The other has power. But the power comes from the belief, not the cup. So, the woman is right that the change is real. But the doctor is right that the drink is not the cause. The big question is if it is okay to use a lie to get a good change. Most people think truth is important. If we start lying to get good changes, we might lie about big things later. So, while the help is real, the way it is given is not open. The belief is not the same as the drink. The drink is just water. The belief is the real help. But hiding that fact is a problem. We should tell the truth about the water. If they still believe, that is their power. But we should not say the water has power. So, the answer is no, they are not the same. The change is good, but the cause is different. And hiding the cause is not right. The belief and the drink are not the same thing. While the belief helps the person feel better, the drink itself does nothing, and hiding this truth is not right.

Person 1: But isn't it better to get the best thing if we can?

Person 2: It is better in the end, but we often need to act now. If we wait too long, the chance might go away. A good answer lets us move on to the next thing.

Person 1: So going fast is more important than how good it is sometimes?

Person 2: Not always. But when the effort to look is too much, a good enough answer is good thinking. We save our power for things that need more care.

Person 1: That makes sense. I guess I should not try to be perfect all the time.

Person 2: Exactly. Being perfect can stop us from doing anything at all. Good enough keeps us moving.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more

The second idea is what the person thinks follows from this. They think that if you believe there are only two ways, you will make a bad choice. You might pick a bad way because you think the other way is the only other choice. You will not see the other ways that might be better.

The third idea is whether the way of thinking is good. This way of thinking is not good. It is not a good way to think because it is not the whole truth. This way of thinking leads to doing things in a way that is not right because it does not look at all the things that could happen.

Willow: "I never said it works because of the pine, Harrow. I tell them it's a healing brew, and they feel better. Their grip strength improves, their sleep deepens. If I told a mother that the brew does nothing, would she still see her child sleep peacefully? The belief itself is the medicine."
Harrow hesitates, torn between scientific rigor and the visible benefit.

Then, we see the second person say the drink works because the people think it helps, and that thought can make the body feel better. Even so, the drink does not hurt and the people do feel better, so the thought part is real help. So we have to look at the two thoughts of truth and good feeling the drink gives. A good answer is to be clear about what is in the drink, and also to use the power of thought to help people, and to not tell a lie.

english_query: what it means for a case to be put together well
ugf_response:
When you want to show that something is true, you must bring together many small pieces of what you know. To do this well, you must follow a few steps.

First, you must have a clear idea of what you want to show. You must know exactly what you are trying to say is true. If you do not know what you want to show, you will get lost.

Second, you must find pieces of what you know that help your idea. These pieces could be things people saw, things people said, or things that happened in the past. Each piece must be a good piece. A good piece is something that is true and something that people can see or feel. If a piece is not true, your whole thing will fall down.

Third, you must put these pieces together in a way that makes sense. You cannot just throw them in a pile. You must show how one piece leads to the next piece. You must show how the pieces work together to make your main idea look strong. It is like building a house. You do not just put wood and stone in a pile. You must put them in a way that makes a strong wall.

The step after the third step is to look for the things that might make your idea look wrong. You must look at the pieces that do not fit. You must think about what a person who does not believe you would say. If you can answer their questions and show why they are wrong, your idea becomes even stronger.

Finally, a thing is put together well if all the pieces fit and they lead to the one thing you wanted to show. If you follow these steps, people will believe you because your story is strong and your pieces are true.

english_query: The Hawks exhibit classic groupthink: (1) illusory unanimity—silence is taken as agreement; (2) direct pressure—captain Lysa frames dissent as betrayal of team spirit; (3) self‑censorship—players like Toren hide legitimate concerns; (4) overconfidence—coach declares the plan flawless without stress‑testing. The result is a high‑risk strategy that may fail because critical risk information is suppressed.
ugf_response: First, we look at the signs given. The team acts like they all agree, but some are just quiet. The leader says that speaking up is bad, so people hide their true thoughts. The person who leads thinks the plan is perfect and does not check for trouble. This means the team is not seeing the real bad things that could happen. Second, we think about what happens when people do not share bad news. If the plan has holes and no one points them out, the team might fail in a big way. Third, someone might say that being one is good and that not believing hurts the team. But being one is only good if it is built on truth, not on fear of speaking. Hiding bad things makes the team less strong, not more. So, the idea that this is a problem is strong because it ignores the trouble of hidden wrong turns. The team is in trouble because they are not listening to the truth. They need to let people speak up to avoid a bad end.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
When you know something, you might want to tell everyone. You might think that telling everyone what you know is the best thing to do. However, this is not always true. There are many reasons why you should be careful about how much you tell.

First, you must think about the people who will hear your words. Some people are kind and want to help. Other people may want to use what you know to hurt you or to take things away from you. If you tell a person how you do a job, they might do that same job and take your place. If you tell them how you make money, they might try to take that money for themselves.

Second, you should think about the things you are telling. Some things are very important and need to be kept safe. If you tell a thing that is meant to be kept only between a few people, you break the trust that people have in you. Once you break that trust, it is very hard to get it back. People will not believe you again, even when you are telling the truth.

Third, telling everything you know can make things hard to understand. If you give too much information to too many people, the information can get changed. People might add things that are not true or leave out things that are true. Then, when someone else hears it, they do not know what is real. This can lead to big things going wrong and many problems.

Finally, you must think about your own work. If you spend all your time telling others what you know, you might not have time to learn new things. You need to keep some things for yourself so you can keep growing and getting better.

So, when you want to share what you know, stop and think. Ask yourself who is listening. Ask yourself if the thing you are saying is safe to say. Ask yourself if telling this will help or if it will make things bad. Being careful with what you say is a good way to live.

english_query: Either the door is open or the door is locked. The door is not open. Therefore, the door is locked. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we notice the first idea says one of two things must be true: the door is open or the door is locked. Then, we see the second idea tells us that the door is not open. Since the first idea says it must be one or the other, and we know it is not the first one, it has to be the second one. So this means the door is locked. The last idea says the door is locked. This follows for sure. follows

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response:
The person says that there are some ways to act toward other people that are always bad. The first idea is that some things are bad no matter what the reason is. The second idea is that you must not do these things even if doing them would lead to a good thing later. The third idea is that the reason for the bad thing does not make the thing itself good.

From these ideas, the person thinks that we must have ways of acting that we never change. They think that we should not look at what will happen in the future to decide if an act is good or bad. Instead, they think we must look at the act itself to see if it is right or wrong. They think that if we only look at what happens later, we might do things that are very bad to one person to make things better for many people. They think this is a way of living that is not right.

We must look at whether this way of thinking is good. The thinking is good if we want to make sure that every person is seen as someone who matters. If we say some things are always wrong, then we can not use one person to help others. This makes a world where people feel safe. However, the thinking might not be good if it makes us do something that lets many people die just to keep a law that we made. If the law makes things much worse for everyone, then the thinking might not be strong. The person is trying to say that we must not let the end of a thing change the way we look at the act itself.

But you and I, who do not want to do this for work, only want to see how these ways of being right fit together, if they agree with each other or not.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
When you know something, it is often good to tell other people. Telling others what you know can help them become better and help the whole group do better. But there are times when telling every single thing you know is not the best thing to do.

First, we must think about what happens if you tell a person who wants to use your words to hurt you or others. If you have a way to make something work or a way to stay away from pain, telling a bad person could let them use that thing to cause pain. In this way, keeping some things to yourself is a way to keep people from being hurt.

Second, we must think about how much time and how much power you have to do things. If you spend all your time telling everyone everything you know, you might not have time to learn new things or to do the work that needs to be done. To do great work, you must sometimes sit alone and think. If you are always talking and sharing, you might lose the power to think in a way that goes far into a thing.

Third, we must think about the people you are talking to. Not everyone is ready to hear everything. If you tell a person something that is too hard for them to understand, they might get confused or even believe things that are not true. It is better to give people only what they can use right now. This helps them get bigger and better in a way that makes sense to them.

The one thing after the third thing is the matter of how people work together. Sometimes, if everyone knows everything at the same time, people might stop trying to find their own ways to think. If you give the answer too soon, the other person might not learn how to find the answer themselves. By waiting, you help them get bigger in their minds.

So, while sharing is good, you must use your mind to decide when to speak and when to stay quiet. You must think about how to keep people from being hurt, the time you have, the mind of the person listening, and how people get better.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
To know what makes a person feel good for a long time, we must look at two different kinds of good feelings. The first kind of good feeling comes from things that happen to us. You might get a new thing to play with, or you might eat something that is very good to eat. These things make you smile, but the feeling goes away quickly. It is like a bright light that turns off after a short time. If you only live for these small moments, you will always be looking for the next thing to make you smile, and you will never feel full in your heart.

The second kind of good feeling is much deeper. It does not come from what you get, but from how you live and who you are. First, a person feels this deep good feeling when they have a reason to get up in the morning. This means they are doing something that feels important to them. It might be helping other people, making something beautiful, or learning something new. When a person uses their own power to do something that matters, they feel a kind of power inside. This power stays with them even when things are hard.

Second, a person feels this deep good feeling when they are part of a group of people who care for them. We are not meant to be alone. When we have people who know us and love us, it gives us a place to belong. This feeling of being known and being loved is a part of our very being. It is not a quick flash of light, but a warm sun that stays in the sky.

Third, a person feels this deep good feeling when they are able to be the person they are in their heart. Many people spend their lives trying to be what others want them to be. This makes the heart feel heavy and tired. But when a person lives in a way that is the same as what they believe is good, they find a quiet mind that does not go away.

So, the deep good feeling comes from three things. It comes from doing work that matters, being with people who love you, and being the real you. These things do not just make you smile for a moment. They build a life that feels good from the inside out, even when the world is not easy.

english_query: If the cat is in the kitchen, then the cat can hear the can opener. The cat is in the kitchen. Therefore, the cat can hear the can opener. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.

This sets up a clear way the two things are tied together. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the cat is in that room right now. Since the cat is in the room, the first part of our if-then idea is true. When the first part of an if-then idea is true, the second part must also be true. So, because the cat is in the room, the cat must be able to hear the sound of the thing that opens cans. The last idea says the cat can hear that sound. This is the same as what we found. So this last idea follows for sure from the earlier ideas. follows

english_query: The queen gives disproportionate weight to a single negative outcome (the smuggler breach) while ignoring the far larger number of positive outcomes (defeating invasions, preventing uprisings). This bias can lead to suboptimal decisions that sacrifice overall performance for the sake of alleviating an emotional sting.

Then, she forgets about the many good things, like stopping big attacks and keeping people from fighting back. This is a problem because making choices from one small hurt instead of the big good means she might do things that hurt her land more than help it. Someone might say that stopping the person hiding goods is very important, but if she stops other good things to do that, she loses more than she gets. So, her way of thinking is not the best way to lead because it ignores the bigger picture for a small feeling of being safe. The woman with power makes bad choices because she cares too much about one small bad thing and not enough about the many big good things. She should look at all the things that happen to make the best plan for her people.

english_query: how to tell when what someone says gives us a good reason to believe it
ugf_response: First, we must look at the person who is speaking to see if they are a good person to believe. We ask if they know what they are talking about or if they are just guessing. If they have seen the thing with their own eyes or have studied it for a long time, it is more possible that they are telling the truth. Second, we must look at the words they use to see if they are trying to make us believe something that is not true. Some people use words that make us feel strong feelings like fear or being very mad to make us believe something that is not true. If the person only wants us to feel a certain way instead of telling us what is real, we should be careful. Third, we look to see if what they say fits with other things we already know are true. If they say something that goes against everything we have seen before, we need more things that show it is true before we believe them. The step after the third step, we ask if there is any reason for them to lie to us. If they get something good by making us believe a lie, then we should not trust them. The step after that, we look to see if more than one person says the same thing. If many people who do not know each other all say the same thing, it is more possible to be true. Finally, we must see if the thing they say can be checked by someone else. If someone else can go and look at the same thing and see the same thing, then we have a very good reason to believe it.

english_query: how to tell when what someone says gives us a good reason to believe it
ugf_response:
When a person says a thing, we all want to know if we can think it is true. We look for a sign that the thing is a good cause for us to think it true. The big thing we ask is how we can tell when a saying gives us that good cause. It is a time that makes us stop and think about what we hear and why we might hold it in our mind as true.  

One way people think about this is to look at how many other people also say the same thing. If a lot of people say it, many think that it is more probably true. Another way is to think about whether we have seen the thing with my own eyes. If we have a see of it with my own eyes, we often feel it is a stronger cause to think it true. A third way is to think about the person who said it. If that person has said true things before, we may give more weight to what they say now. The one after the third way is to see if the new thing goes with what we already know. If it goes with the other things we think are true, we may feel it is safer to add it to our group of true things.  

People give these ways for different reasons. Some people have lived in a world where many voices together have helped them stay safe, so they trust the many. Others have lived where they could see a lot with their own eyes, so they trust what they see more than what they hear. Some have learned that a person who has been right before often is right again, so they trust the word of the person. Some have learned that when a new thing does not go with the other things they think are true, it often turns out to be wrong, so they wait for more signs before they add it to their mind. All of these ideas try to give a good cause for us to think a saying is true, and each of them can help us in different times. The hard part is that we never know for sure which cause will work best, so we keep looking at many signs and trying to pick the one that feels most like a good cause for us.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
Imagine you have a way to make things work better. This could be a way to make food grow fast or a way to make a machine run without stopping. You know how to do this thing. Now you must think about if you should tell everyone how you do it.

The hard question is this. Is it better to tell everyone everything so that everyone can do good things, or is it better to keep it to yourself to keep things safe?

Some people say you must tell everyone. They think that if everyone knows how to do something good, the whole world will get better. They think that if you hide what you know, you are stopping the world from moving forward. They believe that keeping things to yourself is like holding back the light from a dark room. To them, the best thing is to help as many people as you can, even if it means others might use what you know in a bad way.

Other people say you should be careful. They think that if you tell everyone, some people will use what you know to hurt others. They think that some things are too strong or could cause great fear for everyone to have. If you tell a person how to make a bad thing, they might use it to cause pain. These people think that keeping some things hidden from view is the only way to keep people safe. They believe that the good that comes from sharing might not be as big as the bad that comes from the wrong person using it.

There is also a third way of thinking. Some people think you should only tell people who can be trusted. They want to find people who will use what they know to help, not to hurt. But this is not easy because it is hard to know who is good and who is not. They must decide if the chance of being wrong is too high when they look at the chance to do good.

english_query: Also, anyone who gets light in their mind knows they are getting it. But people do not know they are getting this light from the spirits that have no body. So they do not get it from the spirits that have no body.
ugf_response: Thinking and getting light in the mind can be seen in two ways. First, about the thing being seen; so anyone who sees or gets light knows they do, because they see the thing. Second, about the start of the power; so it does not follow that anyone who sees a true thing knows what the mind is, which is the power for thinking. In the same way, not everyone who gets light from a spirit that has no body knows they get it from him.

ugf_response: How can it be any other way?

english_query: the idea that the right thing is usually between two wrong things
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who must make a choice between two ways to act. The first way is bad because it hurts people in a way that is too much. The second way is also bad because it does not do enough to help people. These two ways are at the ends of a line. One end is too much of a bad thing, and the other end is too little of a good thing. Most people think that the best way to act is to find the point in the middle of that line. This is the idea that the good way stays between two ways that are not good.

The hard question is how we can know where that middle point is. If we want to be good, we must know how much is too much and how much is not enough. It is easy to see the ends of the line because they are very bad. It is much harder to find the spot in the middle that is just right. There is no easy way to see it with our eyes. We must use our minds to think about what will happen if we pick one way or the other.

Some people say we should look at what happens after we act. They think we should pick the way that makes the most people feel good and the least number of people feel hurt. For these people, the middle point is the place where all the good things put together are the highest. They try to count the good and the bad to find the best spot. They think this is the only way to be sure we are doing the right thing.

Other people say we should look at what we must do because it is what we should do. They think some things are always wrong, no matter what. They do not care as much about all the good or all the bad put together. They care about following the way things should be. For them, the middle point is not about counting things, but about finding the way that stays true to what is right. They think the middle is found by not going too far in any one way.

There is also a way of thinking that says we should look at how we act. These people think that if we try to be in the middle, we will become better people. They say that being good is a way of living that we learn over time. For them, the middle point is a way to train our own minds to see things well. They believe that by always trying to stay between the two bad ways, we will slowly learn how to see the good way more clearly.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
To understand what makes a person feel good in a way that stays for a long time, we must first look at how two kinds of good feelings are not the same. The first kind is a feeling that comes and goes very fast. This happens when you eat something that has a good way of being in your mouth, or when you get a new thing that you want. This feeling is like a bright light that goes on for a moment and then goes away. It does not stay in your heart or change who you are.

The second kind of feeling is much deeper. It is not a flash of light, but more like a heat that does not change from a fire that keeps you warm all through the night. This kind of feeling comes from how you live your life and how you act toward the world.

First, this deep feeling comes from doing things that are hard but good. When you work to learn something new or when you try to do something that is not easy, you feel a sense of being whole. This is not about the feeling of winning, but about the feeling that you are growing. When you see yourself become better at something because you worked for it, that feeling stays with you. It builds a strong house inside your mind that does not fall down when things go wrong.

Second, this deep feeling comes from how you are with other people. This is not just about having people to talk to or having people who give you things. It is about being known by others and knowing them too. It is about being able to give of yourself to help someone else. When you care for another person and they care for you, it creates a thing that ties you together that makes your life feel like it has a reason to be. This reason is a very strong part of being happy.

Third, this deep feeling comes from living in a way that is the same as what you believe is right. If you believe that being kind is good, but you act in a way that is mean, you will feel a break inside yourself. This break makes it hard to feel good in a real way. But when the things you do and the things you think are the same, you feel a sense of quiet rest. This quiet rest is what we mean when we talk about being happy in the deepest way. It is the feeling that you are a whole person, doing what you should do, in a world where you belong.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
We look at what happened in the past to try to know what will happen in the future. We see that things happened in a certain way before. We see that when one thing happens, another thing often follows. Because of this, we think that if we see the first thing happen again, the second thing will also happen. This is how we try to know what is coming next. We use what we know to make a guess about what we do not know.

The hard question is this. Can we know for sure what will happen just because we know what happened before? We want to believe that the world works in a way that stays the same. We want to believe that the ways things move and change do not change from one day to the next. But how can we be sure that the way things were is the way things will always be? There is no way to look at the past and see every thing that could ever happen.

Some people say that we can trust our guesses. They say that the world does not change its ways. They say that if we look at many things that happened, we can see a path. To them, the past is like a map that shows us where we are going. They think that if we have enough information about what was, we can find the truth about what will be. They believe that the world follows a way that does not change without a reason.

Other people say that we cannot trust these guesses. They say that just because something happened many many times does not mean it will happen again. They say that a new thing can come along and change everything in a moment. They think that the past is not a map, but just a story of things that are now gone. They say that we can never know the future because the world can always do something new that we have never seen before. They think that our way of thinking is a way to make us feel safe when we are actually in a world that is not certain.

english_query: It looks like the part of us that wants things must want them by force, no matter what. Because an old teacher says that bad things are not what we want. So the part that wants must always want the good thing shown to it.
ugf_response: The part that wants can only go after things as good things. But because good things come in many kinds, the part that wants is not forced to pick just one.

english_query: Also, the way, the kind and the order are good themselves. So if what being good really is made of way, kind and order, then each way would need its own way, kind and order. The same would happen with each kind and each order always.
ugf_response: The way, the kind and the order are said good and said things, not because they are things that are there all by themselves, but because through them other things become things and become good. So they do not need other things to be good: we say them good not because something else made them that way, but because they make other things good. For one we do not say white a thing by itself; we say it that because by white another thing can be white.

english_query: Of course, if the moving is to be right.
ugf_response: If they only moved in place and were not changed, we should be able to say what is the way things are of the things that are moving and changing?

english_query:
Mara sketches a decision matrix on a dusty holo‑tablet:

                 Core Spirit Exists      Core Spirit Does Not Exist
Believe:               +∞ (eternal safety)            -c (time spent in rituals)
Disbelieve:            -∞ (catastrophic collapse)   +c (freedom to work)

"Even if the chance of the Core Spirit is one in a million," Mara declares, "the expected utility of believing is 0.000001 × ∞ + 0.999999 × (‑c) = ∞. Infinity overwhelms any finite cost. A rational miner must choose to believe."

A skeptical geologist, Dr. Lian Kade, retorts: "Then I should also believe in the ancient AI deity, the Void Mother, or the Galactic Council—each claims infinite reward and each has a non‑zero probability. Your wager can't tell us which to pick. And can you truly decide to believe something you consider implausible?"
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. The first person says that if a big spirit is real, the good thing you get is forever. If it is not real, the bad thing is small. So, even if the chance is tiny, the count says you should believe because the big good thing is never ending. Then, we look at the other idea. The second person says there are many other big spirits. Each one says the good thing is never ending. If the count works for the first one, it also works for the others. This means the count cannot tell you which one to pick. You could end up picking the wrong one and losing everything. Also, a person cannot just force their mind to think something is true if they do not see a sign. Belief is not a thing you can turn on like a light. So, the plan fails because it gives the same answer for many different things, and because we cannot just choose to believe without a sign. The plan from the first person is not good because it does not help pick one spirit from many, and because a person cannot simply choose to believe something without a sign.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who finds a lost bag of money on the street. There are no people around to see what they do. There are no laws that say they must give it back in that very moment. There are no signs telling them what to do. This person must decide what to do next.

The hard question is this. Should a person do what is right because they must follow the words that people wrote down, or should they do what is right because of who they are inside? This is a question about what makes a person good.

Some people say that we must follow the words that people wrote down. They believe that these words are the only way to keep things good for everyone. They think that if every person just did what they felt was right, things would become not in order and bad. They believe that the words tell us how to act so that we can live together without hurting each other. For these people, the words are the most important thing.

Other people say that the words are not enough. They think that a person who only follows words because they are told to is not a person who is good in a real way. They believe that being a good person means having a heart that wants to do the right thing even when no one is looking and even when there are no words to tell them what to do. They think that if you are a good person, you will do the right thing because it is part of who you are. For these people, the person inside is more important than the words on the paper.

english_query: Hint: Think about whether the truth of the conclusion should affect whether the argument's form is valid.
ugf_response: First, we look at the shape of a thought. This shape is how the first ideas lead to the last idea. If the shape is good, then if the first ideas are true, the last idea must be true. We do not care if the last idea is true in the real world. The shape is just a way to move from start to end. Then, we think about the note given. The note asks if the truth of the last idea changes if the shape is good. It does not. A shape can be good even if the last idea is not true. For one case, if we say all cats are dogs and my dog is a cat, so my dog is a dog, the shape is good. The move works. But the first idea is not true. So the truth of the last idea does not make the shape good or bad. The shape is good because the move is right, not because the end is true. Someone might say that if the end is true, the shape must be good. But this is not so. We can have a bad shape and a true end by chance. So the truth of the end does not change the shape. The truth of the last idea does not change if the way of thinking is right in its shape. The shape is about the move, not the truth of the parts.

english_query: I should say not, old teacher.
ugf_response: But if there is no one who wants to be sad, there is no one, young man, who wants bad things; for what is being sad but the want and having of bad things?
